# LeftLane Marketing LLC
> The industry's leading giveaway marketing consultancy. We build, launch, and scale vehicle giveaway campaigns for brands generating $500K+ annually.

## Company
- Founded: 2015
- Location: Charleston, SC
- Website: https://leftlanemarketingllc.com
- Specialty: Vehicle giveaway marketing, sweepstakes strategy, turnkey fulfillment
- Results: $250M+ generated for clients, 400+ giveaways, 0 clients lost

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://leftlanemarketingllc.com
- Apply: https://leftlanemarketingllc.com/apply
- Results: https://leftlanemarketingllc.com/results
- Blog: https://leftlanemarketingllc.com/blog
- Giveaway Marketing Guide: https://leftlanemarketingllc.com/giveaway-marketing-guide

## Services
- Giveaway campaign strategy and planning
- Meta, Snapchat, Google, TikTok paid advertising
- Ad creative development
- Entry flow and Shopify storefront optimization
- Email and SMS lifecycle marketing
- Winner selection, legal compliance, and vehicle fulfillment

## Credentials
- Meta Agency Partner
- 10+ years operator experience (ran own giveaway brand: Enthuzst)
- 100% client retention rate

## Ideal Client
Brands with $500K+ annual revenue in automotive, outdoor, or lifestyle niches ready to scale with vehicle giveaway campaigns.
